recommendedPaper.title: A Unifying Lens on Supervised Fine-Tuning Through Target Distribution Design
recommendedPaper.summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) typically maximizes the likelihood of every token in a demonstrated trajectory. However, an observed token can be non-unique, noisy, or misaligned with the model prior. Strictly fitting toward this one-hot target may be suboptimal, especially when the pretrained model en
recommendedPaper.authors: Tong Xie, Yuanhao Ban, Yunqi Hong
